title: ferray-polynomial: ChebyshevF32 type (f32 sibling of Chebyshev)
description: Follow-up from #475. PolynomialF32 (power basis) already ships in ferray-polynomial/src/power_f32.rs with the full inherent surface (eval, deriv, integ, add/sub/mul, fit, roots, to_f64, from_f64, with_domain, with_window). Add the parallel ChebyshevF32 sibling for the Chebyshev basis. Same shape: thin f32 type with conversion helpers to/from the f64 Chebyshev. Test parity with the existing Chebyshev tests.
